title: Fancy Circle Crosshair
description: Experience the thrill of shooter games with this FPS inspired crosshair
body:
Customize your gameplay with a redesigned crosshair! This texture pack replaces the vanilla crosshair with a fancy, AAA FPS game-inspired crosshair. Enjoy the subtle yet fun tweak to your hud! 

View all custom crosshairs [here](https://modrinth.com/collection/j7n3r29O)

This pack is compatible with versions 1.21.1 to 1.21.8.
